description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a terracotta-style pot filled with dark soil. The plant itself has two main green stems, each supporting a cluster of vibrant, orange-red flowers with yellow highlights and prominent stamens. The petals are slightly curved and have a natural, organic shape, while the leaves are slender and green, some curling downward. The pot is simple and unadorned, with a subtle horizontal ridge near the top. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, decorative flowering plant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A small terracotta pot holds a vibrant orange-red flowering plant with green stems and leaves, set in dark soil. The flowers are large and detailed, making the plant visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main flower clusters with orange-red petals and visible stamens, and a clear view of the pot's rim and soil.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the overlapping petals and a more pronounced view of the plant's green stems and leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flowers, a visible flower bud, and the curvature of the stems.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a direct look at the central stem and both flower heads, with some leaves curling downward.
